notes: Core game loop and enemy formation exist but the tractor beam capture logic is broken (capturingBoss never set before capturePlayer call), stage 1 enemies spawn already in formation skipping entry animation, dive behavior is simplistic with enemies just falling straight down, and the dual-ship rescue mechanic has logic errors making the game feel incomplete.

The build is mostly stable and controllable, but it is only a loose Galaga approximation with simplified formations/behavior, broken-feeling capture-dual-ship logic, and non-authentic stage/bonus flow.
